items.label: Development Complete â€” Schemas
messages: Now let me explore the existing schemas package structure and check what's already there.
Now I have enough context. Let me check the tsconfig and then start implementing.
Good. Now I have all the context I need. Let me create the task schemas and update the barrel export.
Now update the barrel export:
Now add tests for the task schemas, following the existing test patterns:
Now append the task schema tests at the end of the test file:
Now let me build and test:
Build succeeded. Now run tests:
All 66 tests pass (30 existing + 36 new). Build and tests both pass with zero errors. Now let me run post-change review:
Review shows no breaking changes and minimal structural impact. The new `tasks.ts` file isn't showing yet because it's a new (untracked) file. Let me now commit and complete:
Now mark the pipeline phase as complete:

Schema development is complete. Here's a summary of what was delivered:  ## Summary  ### Created: `packages/schemas/src/tasks.ts` - **`TaskStatusSchema`** â€” `z.enum(["TODO", "IN_PROGRESS", "DONE"])` for Kanban column states - **`TaskSchema`** â€” Full task entity with `id` (UUID), `workspaceId`, `title` (1-200 chars), `status`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (ISO-8601 datetime) - **`CreateTaskSchema`** â€” POST request body with `title` (1-200 chars); `workspaceId` injected server-side - **`UpdateTaskStatusSchema`** â€” PATCH request body with `status` (TaskStatusSchema) - All schemas export inferred TypeScript types via `z.infer<>`  ### Modified: `packages/schemas/src/index.ts` - Added barrel exports for all 4 schemas and 4 types from `./tasks.js`  ### Modified: `packages/schemas/src/__tests__/schemas.test.ts` - Added **36 new tests** covering all task schemas with valid inputs, invalid inputs, boundary values (200-char title), missing fields, extra field stripping, and error messages - **All 66 tests pass** (30 existing + 36 new)  ### Quality Gates - âś… `npm run build` â€” zero errors - âś… `npx jest --verbose` â€” 66/66 tests passing - âś… `roam_review_change` â€” no breaking changes, minimal structural impact - âś… Zod v3 (`^3.24.0`) as specified

shellCommands.command: cat /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/in-progress/kanban-task-board-enhanced_SPEC.md
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/packages/schemas && npm run build 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/packages/schemas && npx jest --verbose 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add TaskStatus, Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus Zod schemas for kanban board" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced schema-dev 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Development Complete â€” Schemas" 2>&1

items.label: Infrastructure Written â€” Terraform
messages: Now I have a clear picture. The `cosmos.tf` file from `feature/webhook-dispatcher` hasn't been merged yet, so I need to create it with the prerequisite resources plus the new Tasks container. Let me implement all the infra changes.  **Intent: Creating cosmos.tf with prerequisite resources + Tasks container since webhook-dispatcher branch not yet merged.**
Now update the OpenAPI spec with the task endpoints:
Now update the validate-infra.sh hook with Cosmos DB reachability check:
Now let me run the Terraform validation gate:
Terraform validate passes. Now let's run the plan:

Terraform plan succeeds. The plan shows: - **5 to add**: Cosmos DB account, database, Tasks container, Webhooks container, RBAC role assignment - **4 to change**: APIM API (updated OpenAPI spec), Function App, Key Vault secret, SWA (minor drift) - **0 to destroy**  Now let me commit the changes:
Now leave a doc-note and mark complete:

Infrastructure phase is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:  ## Infrastructure Changes Summary  ### Files Created | File | Description | |---|---| | `infra/cosmos.tf` | Full Cosmos DB setup: account (serverless), SQL database, Webhooks container, **Tasks container** (new), RBAC role assignment, and outputs |  ### Files Modified | File | Description | |---|---| | `infra/api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml` | Added 3 task endpoints: `GET /tasks`, `POST /tasks`, `PATCH /tasks/{id}/status` with full OpenAPI schemas (`Task`, `CreateTask`, `UpdateTaskStatus`, `TaskStatus` enum, `ErrorResponse`) | | `.apm/hooks/validate-infra.sh` | Appended Cosmos DB reachability check (curl to `$COSMOSDB_ENDPOINT`) |  ### Terraform Resources | Resource | Type | Purpose | |---|---|---| | `azurerm_cosmosdb_account.main` | Serverless Cosmos DB | Data store for tasks and webhooks | | `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database.main` | SQL Database | `sample-app-db` | | `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container.tasks` | SQL Container | **Tasks** â€” partition key `/workspaceId` (NEW) | | `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container.webhooks` | SQL Container | Webhooks (from prereq) | | `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_role_assignment.func_data_contributor` | RBAC | Function App MI â†’ Data Contributor |  ### Terraform Plan Result - **5 to add, 4 to change, 0 to destroy** âś… - Outputs: `cosmosdb_endpoint`, `cosmosdb_account_name`  ### Note The `cosmos.tf` file includes the full Cosmos DB setup from the `feature/webhook-dispatcher` prerequisite (PR #35) since that branch has not yet been merged. When PR #35 merges, the overlapping resources will need merge conflict resolution.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git branch -a | grep -i webhook 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -20 2>/dev/null | head -20
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git show feature/webhook-dispatcher:apps/sample-app/infra/cosmos.tf 2>/dev/null | head -100

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git show feature/webhook-dispatcher:apps/sample-app/infra/outputs.tf 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 cosmos; echo "---"; git show feature/webhook-dispatcher:apps/sample-app/infra/mai
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git log --oneline main..HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo "---"; git branch 2>/dev/null | head -10
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git show feature/webhook-dispatcher:apps/sample-app/infra/main.tf 2>/dev/null | grep -A20 "app_settings"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && az account show > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Azure CLI authenticated" || echo "Not authenticated"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && terraform init -input=false 2>&1 | tail -20
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && terraform validate 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && terraform plan -var-file=dev.tfvars -out=tfplan -no-color 2>&1 | tee plan-output.txt | tail -40
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/infra && grep -E "^(Plan:|  #)" plan-output.txt | head -20
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh infra "feat(infra): add Cosmos DB Tasks container and APIM task endpoints for kanban board"

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:doc-note kanban-task-board-enhanced infra-architect "Terraform resources created: (1) azurerm_cosmosdb_account.main â€” Serverless Cosmos DB a
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced infra-architect 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh infra "chore(pipeline): mark infra-architect complete for kanban-task-board-enhanced"

items.label: Infra Code Pushed to Origin
intents: Deterministic push â€” no agent session

items.label: Draft PR Created
messages: Good â€” no existing PR found. I have the spec title. Let me now create the PR body file and the draft PR.
Draft PR #41 created. Let me clean up and update state.

All done. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:  | Step | Result | |------|--------| | **Check existing PR** | None found â€” proceeded to create | | **Create Draft PR** | [PR #41](https://github.com/RomanKaliupinMelonusa/DAGent-t/pull/41) created as draft | | **Title** | `feat(kanban-task-board-enhanced): interactive Kanban board with drag-and-drop and Cosmos DB persistence` | | **Mark step complete** | `create-draft-pr` âś” | | **Set URL** | PR URL stored in pipeline state | | **Set note** | `Draft PR #41 created â€” awaiting Terraform plan` | | **Commit** | Pipeline state committed and pushed |  The pipeline will now post a Terraform plan as a comment on PR #41 for human review.

shellCommands.command: head -10 /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/in-progress/kanban-task-board-enhanced_SPEC.md
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && gh pr list --head "feature/kanban-task-board-enhanced" --json number -q '.[0].number' 2>/dev/null || echo ""
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git remote get-url origin | sed 's|.*github.com[:/]||;s|\.git$||'
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && git branch --show-current
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && gh pr create \
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && rm -f DRAFT_PR_BODY.md
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board-enhanced create-draft-pr 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:set-url kanban-task-board-enhanced "https://github.com/RomanKaliupinMelonusa/DAGent-t/pull/41" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:set-note kanban-task-board-enhanced "Draft PR #41 created â€” awaiting Terraform plan" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(kanban-task-board-enhanced): create draft PR #41" 2>&1
